rationale: Twenty-one exact official MTA rows exhaust the remaining non-start QBNR work units that already have unique current route anchors. Every row binds one realized date, one current route, and all source-stated treatment members. Alternative-route and unchanged-service language is exhaustively classified as context and creates no route edge; source summaries for Q101 and Q102 are retained as context without duplicating their detailed changes. Q76 is retained as an exact three-member bundle because its College Point reroute, Q20B service replacement, and stop removal are separately stated and unambiguous.

clauses.label: Q5 weekday terminal service discontinuation
clauses.source_quote: The Q5 will no longer serve Green Acres Mall or the Rosedale LIRR station on weekdays.
clauses.description: Q5 weekday service to Green Acres Mall and Rosedale LIRR station was discontinued.

clauses.source_quote: For weekday service to Green Acres Mall, take the new Q87 .
clauses.review_rationale: Alternative-service guidance; no Q87 route edge.

clauses.source_quote: For weekday service to Rosedale LIRR, take the new Q86 .
clauses.review_rationale: Alternative-service guidance; no Q86 route edge.

clauses.source_quote: On weekends, the Q5 will keep its current service.
It will terminate at Green Acres Mall during the day and at Rosedale LIRR station overnight.
clauses.review_rationale: Description of the explicitly unchanged weekend pattern.

clauses.source_quote: The Q5 Limited will be discontinued.
clauses.description: The Q5 Limited variant was discontinued.
